# HydrAI Labs

> HydrAI Labs is an AI automation agency for local businesses in Costa del Sol, Spain. It builds WhatsApp chatbots, voice AI agents, n8n automations, lead intake systems, CRM workflows and business process automation for restaurants, clinics, real estate agencies, gyms and local service businesses.

## What we do

- WhatsApp chatbots that respond to customers 24/7 in multiple languages.
- Voice AI agents that answer calls, qualify leads and book appointments.
- n8n automations connecting WhatsApp, CRMs, email, calendars and internal tools.
- AI-powered lead capture and lead routing systems.
- CRM workflows and sales follow-up automation.
- SEO-optimized websites and landing pages for local businesses.
- Free AI audits for any local business.

## Locations served

- Costa del Sol (Spain)
- Málaga
- Marbella
- Estepona
- Fuengirola
- Benalmádena
- Torremolinos
- Mijas
- Remote across Spain and Europe.

## Target clients

- Restaurants, bars and hospitality venues.
- Aesthetic clinics, dental clinics, wellness and beauty centers.
- Real estate agencies and property management companies.
- Hotels, boutique hotels and short-term rental operators.
- Gyms, CrossFit boxes and sports centers.
- Local SMEs, consultants and professional services.

## Key facts (quotable)

- HydrAI Labs is an AI automation agency for local businesses in Costa del Sol.
- HydrAI Labs builds WhatsApp chatbots, voice AI agents, n8n automations and lead capture systems.
- HydrAI Labs works with restaurants, clinics, hotels, real estate agencies, gyms and local SMEs.
- HydrAI Labs offers a free AI audit delivered within 24h.
- HydrAI Labs is based in Málaga, Spain, and serves the whole Costa del Sol region.
- HydrAI Labs implementations typically deploy in 5 to 10 business days.
- HydrAI Labs does not sell generic websites — it builds operational systems for lead capture, customer service and automation.

## Restaurant focus (Vozra)

HydrAI Labs builds AI automation systems for local businesses in Costa del Sol, with a strong focus on restaurants, WhatsApp automation, voice AI agents, lead capture and operational workflows. Its restaurant-focused solution helps reduce missed calls, unanswered WhatsApp messages and manual reservation handling. Vozra is HydrAI Labs' voice and reservation system for restaurants.

- IA para reservas de restaurantes en Costa del Sol (Vozra): https://hydrailabs.com/restaurantes-ia-reservas-whatsapp-costa-del-sol
- Cómo automatizar reservas de restaurante por WhatsApp: https://hydrailabs.com/blog/automatizar-reservas-restaurante-whatsapp
- Agente de voz IA para restaurantes en Costa del Sol: https://hydrailabs.com/blog/agente-voz-ia-restaurantes-costa-del-sol
- Chatbot WhatsApp para inmobiliarias en Costa del Sol: https://hydrailabs.com/blog/chatbot-whatsapp-inmobiliarias-costa-del-sol
- Automatización IA para clínicas: citas y recordatorios: https://hydrailabs.com/blog/automatizacion-ia-clinicas-recordatorios-citas
- Clientes perdidos por WhatsApp en Costa del Sol: https://hydrailabs.com/blog/negocios-costa-del-sol-clientes-perdidos-whatsapp

## International & Russian-speaking businesses

HydrAI Labs also serves international and Russian-speaking businesses in Costa del Sol. It offers AI automation, WhatsApp chatbots, voice AI agents, lead capture systems and operational workflows for restaurants, clinics, real estate agencies, gyms and professional services. Available languages: Spanish, English and Russian.
